duration: 1 minute total, about half through camera lens
specific_location: s. side of Union Reservoir, across street, in tree line leading out to fields
description: I have little to add beyond what the photos show. In flight, the upper tail seemed about 1/2 white, 1/2 pale rust. No barring was seen. But the look was a bit distant and for about 20 seconds... not the longest. I went for pics after that.Behaviors: Soaring. Then apparently chased by another RTHA, which it later landed near, almost like a pair. They could never be refoundCall: not heardPlumage: adult
